signup_successful: Signup successful. Please check your email and log in.
reset_link_sent: If the email exists, a reset link was sent
attempt_must_be_submitted: Attempt must be submitted before grading
retakes_disabled: Retakes are disabled for this test
could_not_create_attempt: Could not create attempt — please try again
cannot_modify_submitted: Cannot modify answers on a submitted attempt
identity_verification_required: Identity verification is required before answering questions
question_not_in_exam: Question does not belong to this exam
cannot_submit_current_state: Attempt cannot be submitted in its current state
attempt_must_be_submitted_review: Attempt must be submitted before review
only_manual_review: Only manual-review answers can be reviewed
review_all_manual: Review all manual answers before finalizing
attempt_score_not_finalized: Attempt score could not be finalized
attempt_must_be_submitted_cert: Attempt must be submitted before certificate review
cert_not_configured: Certificate not configured for this test
cert_no_proctoring_review: This certificate does not require a proctoring review decision
finalize_answer_review_first: Finalize answer review before certificate review
face_not_detected: Face not detected in the photo
cloudflare_must_be_enabled: Cloudflare video storage must be enabled for proctoring recordings
cloudflare_not_configured: Cloudflare video storage is not configured
playback_url_invalid: playback_url must be an absolute Cloudflare URL
valid_video_filename_required: A valid video filename is required
supabase_no_file_ref: Supabase video upload returned no file reference
cf_queue_unavailable: Cloudflare video upload queue is unavailable
bg_proctoring_not_enabled: Background proctoring jobs are not enabled
only_in_progress_pause: Only in-progress attempts can be paused
only_in_progress_resume: Only in-progress attempts can be resumed
email_or_userid_exists: Email or User ID already exists
password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
cannot_add_to_published: Cannot add questions to a published test
cannot_modify_published: Cannot modify questions on a published test
cannot_delete_published: Cannot delete questions on a published test
pool_no_questions: Pool has no questions. Add questions to the pool before seeding this test.
cannot_seed_published: Cannot seed questions into a published test
cannot_delete_cat_assigned: Cannot delete a category assigned to existing tests
cannot_delete_course_attempts: Cannot delete a course that has learner attempts
at_least_one_band: At least one grade band is required
cannot_delete_grading_assigned: Cannot delete a grading scale that is assigned to existing tests
cannot_delete_node_attempts: Cannot delete a node that has learner attempts
schedule_update_conflict: Failed to update schedule due to a conflict
schedule_delete_conflict: Failed to delete schedule due to a conflict
cannot_delete_active_attempt: Cannot delete schedule while user has an active attempt
valid_cron_required: A valid cron schedule is required
survey_id_mismatch: survey_id does not match the target survey
only_learners_in_groups: Only learners can be added to groups
permissions_row_feature: Each permissions_config row must include a feature
allow_signup_bool: allow_signup must be true or false
enable_retakes_or_reduce: Enable retakes or reduce max attempts to 1.
title_already_exists_module: A test with this title already exists for this module
cannot_delete_test_attempts: Cannot delete test with existing attempts or schedules
must_have_question_publish: Test must have at least one question before publishing
batch_analysis_running: Batch video analysis is still running.
